changes.reason: STALE_0DTE breakout fallback is the weakest active fallback sleeve: 2 trades, only 40.5 PnL/exposure hour, 52.6 minute median hold, and -250.25 worst MAE. Raising structure from 4 to the grid value 5 tests whether stale-data breakout entries need top-tier ES structure confirmation without touching VALID_0DTE profiles.

The stale breakout slice shows high RSI but weak realization efficiency; increasing the fallback RSI threshold from 48 to 52 keeps only stronger ES momentum when option evidence is unavailable or stale.
Lowering fixed TP from 3 to 2.5 is a narrow stale/no-0DTE realization test intended to reduce long recovery exposure in breakout fallback trades while preserving the ES-only fallback role.

expected_effect: Should improve no-0DTE fallback exposure efficiency and reduce stale breakout MAE/hold drag while leaving VALID_0DTE and 1DTE option-confirmed edges unchanged. Main tradeoff is losing or underpaying the tiny stale breakout sample; reject if fallback expectancy turns negative or total net profit retention falls below 98%.
label: promote
rationale: Use batch_g_missing_0dte_policy_adapted, focused only on breakout_long_no_0dte. The current leader is strong overall, but STALE_0DTE fallback is low-efficiency and breakout_long_no_0dte is the worst stale fallback sleeve. This is not a global veto or option-profile change; it isolates stale/no-0DTE ES confirmation quality after prior broad pruning and extended-VWAP veto repair failed to improve score.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: STALE_0DTE has 5 trades and $162.8, but breakout_long_no_0dte contributes only $71 over 2 trades with 40.5 PnL/exposure hour, 52.6 minute median hold, and -250.25 worst MAE. VALID_0DTE remains the core edge and should be unaffected by no-0DTE profile tuning.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Stale No-0DTE Breakout Quality Box
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Sample size is tiny; stricter structure and RSI can remove positive fallback insurance or underpay the single cleaner expired/no-0DTE breakout pattern.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: STALE_0DTE or EXPIRED_0DTE router selects breakout_long_no_0dte and the trade must rely on ES continuation rather than valid 0DTE option confirmation.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Fallback PnL/exposure improves versus 83.2 aggregate and 40.5 breakout stale slice, fallback worst MAE improves or stays flat, VALID_0DTE trades/PnL remain unchanged, total net profit stays >=98% of leader, and slow_12h remains 0.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: Short 12.3-day, high-win-rate, take-profit-only SPX500 long scalper regime. Realized losses and slow >=12h trades are zero, so the risk-reducer target is hidden MAE, long recove...
